title: Statement.getGeneratedKeys() returns unexpected value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO table1 (id, value) VALUES (2, NULL);
INSERT INTO table1 (id, value) VALUES (3, CAST(123 AS VARCHAR));
key_bug_features: stmt.getGeneratedKeys() returns incorrect values after insert
